title: 3 Net Debt Heavy High Yielders
text: Enterprise valuation is in part the process of forecasting a company's future expected free cash flows and discounting them to determine its equity value. Companies with large net cash positions and a high probability of upward free cash flow revisions have considerable potential for capital appreciation, in our view. Altria, Energy Transfer, and Kinder Morgan are high yield stocks with net debt positions, but they cover their dividends with traditional free cash flow.

title: The Dividend Investor's Natural Gas Export Playbook - Part 2
text: Multiple natural gas export terminals are set to begin operations, increasing LNG exports from 14 BCF/d to over 26.5 BCF/day by 2030. Projects such as Golden Pass, Plaquemines, and Corpus Christi will come online in the next few years, adding 5 BCF/d of capacity. Investors can benefit from investing in producers, midstream companies, export terminals, and maritime transportation companies in the natural gas value chain.
